{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230406199A2978BC3003A73AD7C1"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618232059293074238","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一般般，无脑爽文吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773761371,"group_id":"7610054602838248473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"支持一切认真写书的作者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzkSCL1bKQlFojy8Aty0uVA6roCGK2D3c8R3Je2WMW59","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2a5616afed0a4cbda26eaf2f37f504cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795325&x-signature=Zf%2FJSP5eeTkPsyNliZTHFQsjf4k%3D","user_id":"2263210889061060","user_name":"原初之瑜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2263210889061060","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610054602838248473","book_info":{"abstract":"分身流+无敌流
加班到深夜张逸猝死了。
再睁眼，他来到了鬼灭世界，还没来得及消化这份“惊喜”，他就沉沉睡去，却在一个神秘空间里，被一只正在吞云吐雾的皮卡丘当场抓获：“你谁啊？”
“我张逸啊！”
.......
鬼灭之刃里，他手持日轮刀，举起一个小太阳，看着鬼舞辻无惨：“无惨，起床晒太阳了！”
海贼世界，他一巴掌按住伊姆的脑袋：“就你叫伊姆啊？”
火影世界，他立于须佐能乎之上，轻拍辉夜姬的脸：“老实点，否则腿打断。”
死神世界，他一脚踹飞友哈巴赫，懒洋洋地摆摆手：“别吵，我要晒太阳、打游戏。”
不同的时间，不同的世界，相同的只有一件事——
张逸靠着自己的双手，在所有危险世界里，过上了梦寐以求的安逸生活。
主要世界海贼，火影，死神，漫威，中间掺杂其他世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o50ab87c3a5edc369008f747197276a8f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"云端的纸鸢","author_id":"","book_id":"7610054602838248473","book_name":"开局加班猝死，同时穿越不同世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610054607259042329","read_count":"723","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"115978"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"56","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,穿越,二次元,开局,无敌,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o50ab87c3a5edc369008f747197276a8f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393979&x-signature=8xofdferpC%2B%2FvpwhtE8zV%2BeifsA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"611753668131383","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","
